final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00001; // Initialize to a non-zero state
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[2]}; // Feedback polynomial x^5 + x^3 + 1
        end
    end
endmodule
